subject: A massive dark spider in its web, with a caught figure below and scattered gems
description: A colossal spider crouches at the center of a dense white web, its body dark and glossy with multiple visible eyes. The web is strung between what appear to be vine-covered ruins or pillars. Below the spider, a humanoid figure — small relative to the spider — appears caught or entangled in the web. Scattered through the web are small glinting gems or jewels, which the spider appears to have collected as lures. Blood-red accents mark the spider's abdomen. The setting is dim green and grey.
foreground: Giant spider in web; caught humanoid figure below; gems scattered in web
background: Vine-covered ruins, dense webbing, dim green light
emotion: dread; the predator is patient and the prey is helpless
